arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso and Leverkusen want to prove they're here to stay despite Bayern's 'dominance'
arts.sum: That’s the question facing Xabi Alonso and Bayer Leverkusen as they seek to prove they belong among European soccer’s top teams after ending Bayern Munich’s 11-year reign in the German league last season. “What we did last year was quite unique, so we had an idea that we wanted to be sustainable in our success,” Alonso said Friday.

arts.ttl: Sigh of relief: Bayern Munich executives at ease after massive Jamal Musiala deal
arts.sum: After signing star attacker Jamal Musiala to a long-term contract, Bayern Munich executives Max Eberl and Christoph Freund let out a sigh of relief. As for sporting director Christoph Freund, Musiala was a key figure to get signed to an extension.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso Says Bayern Munich Battle Won’t Decide Bundesliga Title
arts.sum: With Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen side trailing Bundesliga leaders, Bayern Munich by eight points, the Leverkusen Head Coach tried to play down the hype on Friday ahead of an enthralling…

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The late kick-off on Saturday could go a long way in deciding the title. After B04’s draw to VfL Wolfsburg last week, they can’t afford to lose against league leaders…

arts.ttl: Kompany Raises Fixture Congestion Concerns Ahead of Bayer Leverkusen Clash
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany speaks to the media ahead of a critical top-of-the-table Bundesliga clash

arts.ttl: Official | Jamal Musiala extends his contract at Bayern Munich until 2030
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have announced that Jamal Musiala has extended his contract at the club until 2030, signing one of the most lucrative contract extensions in Bayern Munich’s history. On extending…

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Where things stand with Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz; A greatest rock band list? Let’s embrace debate over this mess!; Throwing it back to The Clash; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: As rumors have swirled for months, the most recent news points to Wirtz extending his current deal with Bayer Leverkusen — except working in a release clause for 2026. Bayern Munich travels to Bayer Leverkusen for a massive Bundesliga match...

arts.ttl: Hermoso to miss out against Bayern
arts.sum: Mario Hermoso will not be involved when Bayer Leverkusen take on Bayern Munich in Saturday's much-anticipated game at the BayArena.

arts.ttl: 'Here's my advice to Harry Kane about Arsenal transfer after I spent six months at Spurs'
arts.sum: Harry Kane has been linked with a shock move to Arsenal with the Gunners in increasing need of attacking reinforcements - but a former Spurs star has warned him off the switch

arts.ttl: Musiala signs new Bayern contract until 2030
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala has signed a new contract at Bayern Munich that is set to keep him at the Bundesliga club until 2030.
